humanSummary.text: Final re-audit found no P0/P1 blockers. The nested resolver fake-success path is closed with structural validation and regression coverage, and the canonical resolver fixture still emits reviewable exact-link, fuzzy-candidate, conflict, provenance, and no-match diagnostics. A non-blocking CLI test fixture drift remains.

findings.title: Catalog resolver CLI test uses stale inline fixture expectations
findings.description: The CLI resolver test still uses inline expectations with two exact links, work-dlsite, and one conflict while the canonical public resolver fixture and artifact now expose three exact links, work-dlsite-rj349517, and two conflict rows.

evidence.detail: Final re-audit confirmed the canonical DB package fixture covers the current artifact shape, but the CLI test can drift because it does not derive expectations from fixtures/catalog-resolver/fixture.json.
pnpm exec vp run catalog:resolve-fixture and DB-backed ci-itotori passed after the nested validation repair.

findings.impact: The implementation is mergeable because canonical fixture and artifact tests cover the resolver behavior, but future CLI changes could pass against stale inline data.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: The catalog resolver CLI test no longer carries a stale inline resolver fixture shape.
CLI test expectations cover the same exact-link ids, conflict ids, fuzzy candidate ids, and diagnostics as the canonical resolver artifact.
Changing the canonical resolver fixture without regenerating or updating CLI expectations fails a targeted test.

proposedDagNode.title: Catalog resolver CLI fixture canonicalization
proposedDagNode.summary: Replace the catalog resolver CLI inline fixture expectation with the canonical recorded resolver fixture so CLI tests cannot drift from the public artifact shape.
deliverables: CLI resolver test that reads or derives expectations from fixtures/catalog-resolver/fixture.json
Assertion coverage for the canonical three exact links and two conflict rows
Regression check that catalog resolver CLI output remains aligned with artifacts/catalog/resolver-integration.json
acceptanceCriteria: The catalog resolver CLI test no longer carries a stale inline resolver fixture shape.
CLI test expectations cover the same exact-link ids, conflict ids, fuzzy candidate ids, and diagnostics as the canonical resolver artifact.
Changing the canonical resolver fixture without regenerating or updating CLI expectations fails a targeted test.
auditFocus: Inline fixture drift from canonical resolver fixtures
CLI test overfitting to stale catalog ids
Generated artifact and CLI output mismatch
